calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 501. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Stephen Schen, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Ronald Gee.
Plaintiff's Witness Ronald Gee was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Pernell Gregg Davenport aka Gregory Davenport.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 38 Cordova Street, # 1, San Francisco, CA. 94112
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Holdover damages in total of $5,160.00
Costs - $0.00
Atty Fees - 0.00
Total Judgment - $5,160.00
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Assigned To Trial Court
